columns.extraction_plan: The 'Patients and Methods' section on page 1 and the 'Study Assessments' section on page 3 explicitly list the primary endpoint (overall survival) and secondary endpoints (time to development of CRPC, time to clinical progression, etc.). Quality of Life is not mentioned as an endpoint or reported outcome for the CHAARTED trial in these sections, nor in any of the tables (Table 1, 2, 3) or figures (Fig 1, 2, 3, 4). While the introduction on page 1 mentions that combining novel therapies 'improve quality of life and OS' as a general strategy, it does not state that QoL was an outcome measured or reported in this specific trial.
